title: Hair Clippers Men Professional, Mens Clippers and Trimmers Set, USB Rechargeable Cordless Hair Clippers for Hair Cutting, Electric T-Blade Hair Trimmer for Men with Package Case (Gloden)
features: A Game-changer Especially for Family Hair Cutting - This Mens Grooming Kit and Hair Trimmer can handle all your grooming needs. It includes a hair clipper with 9 guide combs(1/16",1/8", 3/16",1/4", 3/8", 1/2",5/8", 3/4",7/8" ) Right Ear Taper*1,Left Ear Taper*1, a 3-in-1 trimmer (nose/ear trimmer, beard trimmer, Zero Gapped T-blade)with 3 guide combs(1/3/5mm), 10 ml blade oil, blade cleansing brush ,even a barber cape, EVA package case and 2 USB charging cable (Not including adapter). Whether you're maintaining your beard, fading your haircut or all of the above, this grooming kit for men can handle it.

Cutting Thick or Curly Hair like Hot Knife through Butter - The Hair Clippers and Trimmer for Men has powerful motor delivers a consistent, high-speed up to 7000RPM that meets professional baber standards. The VGRPRO's professionally customized blades are sharp enouth can even instantly cut through a bundle of copper wire! The VGRPRO electric hair clippers men set perform with impressive efficiency and none pulling or snagging.

Fading is Done in One Step - Offering an exclusively designed fade comb (2mm thick at the base, 6mm thick at the top) to make fading exceptionally easy. Adjustable Fade Lever offers Precise Control (0.5-1.5mm) - which are great at doing fades and getting lines out. The hair clippers for men and hair trimmer men set are so versatile for full haircuts to slight trims or neatening sideburns and necklines. Zero gaped precision trimmer (0.1MM close) is perfect for beard & eyebrow & manscaping trimming as well.

Long Battery Life for All-day Use, Cordless and Rechargeable - Hair clippers men cordless Powerful battery was built in the VGRPRO cordless clippers for men haircut and grooming set can run up to 240 minutes for multiple cuts on a single charge. Wireless design makes it easy to use. Cordless hair clippers USB charging with universal voltage support.

Key Features for Family Hair Cutting - VGRPRO Hair clippers men designed especially for children with 70 dB silent mode; ergonomic design for easy gripping; LED battery life indicator clearly shows the remaining power, charge status and blade lubrication; detachable blade head for easy cleaning.

Perfect Gift - Made of metal guaranteed heavy-duty; and the antique bronze metal casing is like a piece of art；Upgraded packaging, both luxurious and convenient for storage, to prevent accessory loss. Perfect for fathers day gifts for dad grandpa, birthday gifts for men, dad, husband, boyfriend, or brother.
